channel.title: Ddns on Whatever blog
channel.description: Recent content in Ddns on Whatever blog

item.title: cloudflare ddns的routeros脚本
item.description: Insert Lead paragraph here. 在参考了j大佬的博客和这位作者的脚本的脚本后, 魔改的. 适用在cloudflare上更新ipv4和ipv6的动态ip; 和原作者不同的是, 我的脚本是直接从ros接口上取相应ip, 其实我这脚本是放在ppp profile-on up-script中, 在拨号完成后执行一次, 而不是定时反复执行, 故相应修改了代码. token, zone_id, record_id等请先行获取, 获取方法在前述j大佬博客中有所提及. 1# Cloudflare Dynamic DNS update script 2# Required policy: read, write, test, policy 3# Add this script to scheduler 4# Install DigiCert root CA or disable check-certificate 5# Modified from https://gist.github.com/kolobus/18680f8fb01ce3003cb9a3f82c9d30e1 6# Configuration --------------------------------------------------------------------- 7 8:local TOKEN "" 9 10:local ZONEIDv6 "" 11:local RECORDIDv6 "" 12:local RECORDNAMEv6 "" 13:local IP6NEW 14 15:local ZONEIDv4 "" 16:local RECORDIDv4 "" 17:local RECORDNAMEv4 "" 18:local IP4NEW 19 20:local WANIF "" 21 22#------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 23 24 25 26 27:if ([/interface get $WANIF value-name=running]) do={ 28 29 # IPv6 check 30 31 :local "IP6NEW" [/ipv6/address get [:pick [find dynamic global interface=$WANIF] 0 ] address] 32 :set "IP6NEW" [:pick $"IP6NEW" 0 [:find $"IP6NEW" "/"]] 33 34 :local url "https://api.
